mapper.update: update MarketGoods set Number=0 where GID=#{GID}
mapper.select: select * from marketgoods where Number>0 and Status='ACTIVE' and Name like concat('%', #{KeyWords}, '%')
select * from marketgoods where Number>0 and Status='ACTIVE' and Kind like concat('%', #{KeyWords}, '%')
select * from marketgoods where Number > 0 and Status='ACTIVE'
select * from marketgoods where Number > 0 and Status='ACTIVE' and Kind = #{kind}
select GID, Name, Kind, Price, Number, Image, Comment, Status, DeliveryMode, PickupLocation, CampusOnly, ReviewNote, PublishedAt from marketgoods where GID=#{GID}
select * from marketgoods where Number > 0 and Status='ACTIVE' order by GID desc limit #{start}, 12
select count(*) from marketgoods where Number > 0 and Status='ACTIVE';

select * from marketgoods where Number > 0 and Status='ACTIVE' order by Price
ASC
DESC
limit #{begin}, 12

select * from marketgoods where Number > 0 and Status='ACTIVE' order by Number
ASC
DESC
limit #{begin}, 12
select * from marketgoods where Number > 0 and Status='ACTIVE' order by GID desc limit #{begin}, 12
